//: typecheck dependsOn ^build (not ^typecheck): extensions typecheck with `tsc --noEmit` and resolve upstream package types from dist/*.d.ts, which only `build` produces. typecheck.outputs is [] (never caches dist), so depending on ^build means a typecheck cache hit still restores upstream dist (build.outputs) to disk first — otherwise a clean CI checkout sees missing .d.ts and fails TS2307. --- e2e: every e2e task drives the PACKAGED editor (apps/editor/out) + reads built-in extensions from their repo `extensions/<ext>/dist`; an extension does NOT depend on @universe-editor/editor (dep runs the other way), so the global e2e task depends on `@universe-editor/editor#build` to keep the host fresh. The editor's own e2e suite activates git/typescript/markdown via its scoped core*App fixtures; those are declared devDependencies of @universe-editor/editor (so turbo affected re-runs core when they change — see scripts/e2e/affected-e2e-matrix.mjs), which also means the editor#e2e `^build` builds them automatically — no per-extension #build override needed. Net: `turbo run e2e --filter=<anything>` always builds a fresh host + the exact extensions the suite exercises.
